title: ContextFactory.java
description:
This file provides a factory for creating MapReduce Context Objects, handling version inconsistencies. It initializes static constructors and fields for different context types, offering methods to clone JobContext and TaskAttemptContext with new configurations. It collaborates with Hadoop's core classes for context instantiation, ensuring compatibility across different Hadoop versions.

TITLE: Multithreaded Mapper Implementation
DESCRIPTION: The 'lib/map' directory contains MultithreadedMapper.java, which implements concurrent Mapper execution. It manages a thread pool, ensuring thread safety with SubMapRecordReader and SubMapRecordWriter. This design boosts throughput for non-CPU-intensive tasks, integrating seamlessly within Hadoop's MapReduce framework.

TITLE: Task Directory in Hadoop MapReduce
DESCRIPTION: The 'task' directory manages task-specific contexts. It includes MapContextImpl.java, ReduceContextImpl.java, and TaskAttemptContextImpl.java. These files collaborate to provide necessary contextual information to Mappers and Reducers. The directory employs a layered architectural pattern, with higher-level contexts built upon TaskAttemptContext, illustrating a clear separation of concerns and supporting modularity and scalability in Hadoop's MapReduce framework.
